name: obsidian
tagline: ClawHub (444★): Work with Obsidian vaults (plain Markdown notes) and automate via obsidian-cli.
verdict: Weak spot: no scope boundaries at all, despite covering search, create, move, and delete -- an agent could misfire on the wrong operation. Only the create path even discusses failure (URI handler issues); search, move, and delete are left silent if something goes wrong. Security is clean though.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' / exclusion / out-of-scope guidance appears anywhere in the description or body, despite the skill covering multiple distinct operations (search, create, move, delete)
No version field in frontmatter, no changelog section, and no dated revision notes anywhere in the file.
Only the create path gets any failure mention (URI handler must be working, may be refused for dot-folders); search, move, delete, and 'obsidian-cli not installed' are left with ze
